title: bulbophyllum hystricinum
intro: Bulbophyllum hystricinum, also known as the "porcupine orchid," is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Bulbophyllum hystricinum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing its roots and leaves in hot water to create a tea that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
